create-voiceover.name: Podcast Intro
create-voiceover.content: 欢迎回到《创意前沿》播客节目，在这里我们一同探寻想象力与科技交融碰撞的领域。我是主持人，今天我们将深入探讨人工智能正在如何改变叙事创作的方式。从图像生成到语音合成，创意创作流程正经历前所未有的重塑。泡上一杯咖啡，让我们一同探寻叙事创作的未来，从每一个像素开始细细探索。

create-voiceover.name: Product Explainer
create-voiceover.content: Meet VisionX — your AI-powered assistant for image editing. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, VisionX helps you enhance photos, remove backgrounds, and create stunning visuals in seconds. With smart suggestions, drag-and-drop simplicity, and real-time feedback, you don't need to be a designer to look like one. Start with a template or upload your own—either way, the results are magical. Try VisionX today, and make your visuals unforgettable.

create-voiceover.name: Ad Teaser
create-voiceover.content:
这绝非一款普通手机。
它是你的相机、创作画布、专属工作室——全部收纳于口袋之中。
全新Lynq X3本周五正式发布。
没错，它完全配得上所有期待。

create-voiceover.name: Brand Story
create-voiceover.content: Once upon a time, in a garage with just one laptop and a big dream, our story began. Our founder believed creativity should be accessible to everyone, not just professionals. So they built tools for storytellers, dreamers, and everyday creators. What started as a side project turned into a platform used by millions. Today, that same spirit lives on in everything we make. This isn't just a brand. It's a movement.

voice-changer.name: 旁白变声
voice-changer.content: 将源音频转换为目标音色，保持语速与情感，适用于播客片头、产品介绍等旁白场景。

voice-changer.name: 角色配音
voice-changer.content: 保留原始表演节奏，替换为角色音色，适合动画对白、游戏台词与短视频角色演绎。

voice-changer.name: 译制风格
voice-changer.content: 在清晰可懂的前提下调整音色质感，用于多语言版本或本地化配音预览。
